suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the company-run-chain blocker derivation pattern in library/
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature closeout-blocker-reviewer-wait-visibility uses a derived truth pattern where blockers are computed from activity events (reviewer_wake_deferred) combined with run state, without additional DB storage. This pattern is implemented in server/src/routes/issues.ts buildCompanyRunChainBlocker().
